topic: Why Facebook-only businesses are invisible on Google
caption:
Facebook won't show up when someone Googles 'HVAC near me.' Google indexes websites, not Facebook pages. If you don't have a site, you don't exist to most customers. We build websites that get your High Desert business found. DM us 'SITE' to get started.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #LocalSEO #WebDesign #SmallBusinessOwner #VeteranOwned #WebsiteDesign #GoogleSearch #GetFoundOnline
alt_text: Bold graphic with the text 'Facebook is not a website' on a clean background, with the BuildMyWebNow logo and website URL at the bottom.

copy.headline: Facebook Is Not a Website. Google Knows.
copy.body: If your business only lives on Facebook, it's nearly invisible in Google search. A real website puts you on the map when locals are actually looking.
copy.caption: Facebook won't show up when someone Googles 'HVAC near me.' Google indexes websites, not Facebook pages. If you don't have a site, you don't exist to most customers. We build websites that get your High Desert business found. DM us 'SITE' to get started.
